subcodes.first_line: The mention and utterance of the Desire of all worlds hath reached such station as to encompass both the universe and all them that dwell therein; yet [3.5s]... ...O people of Baha! That there is none to rival you is a sign
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر و بیان مقصود عالمیان بمقامی رسیده که عالم و عالمیان را احاطه نموده ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
